name: 📚 Students by Date Range & Department
description: Get students enrolled between two dates, filter by department
sql: SELECT s.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name, s.email, s.course_code, c.course_name, s.enrollment_date FROM students s JOIN courses c ON s.course_code = c.course_code WHERE s.enrollment_date BETWEEN '{start_date}' AND '{end_date}' AND c.department = '{department}' ORDER BY s.enrollment_date

name: 📋 Attendance Report by Date Range
description: Get attendance records for a specific date range
sql: SELECT a.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name, a.course_code, a.attendance_date, a.status FROM attendance a JOIN students s ON a.student_id = s.student_id WHERE a.attendance_date BETWEEN '{start_date}' AND '{end_date}' ORDER BY a.attendance_date

name: 📝 Exam Results by Semester
description: Get exam results for a specific semester
sql: SELECT e.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name, e.course_code, e.exam_name, e.score, e.grade FROM exams e JOIN students s ON e.student_id = s.student_id WHERE e.semester = '{semester}' ORDER BY e.score DESC

name: 💰 Student Financial Transactions
description: Get fee payment history for a student
sql: SELECT transaction_date, transaction_type, amount, payment_method, receipt_number, status FROM transactions WHERE student_id = '{student_id}' ORDER BY transaction_date DESC

name: 👨‍🏫 Staff by Department
description: List all staff in a specific department
sql: SELECT staff_id, first_name, last_name, position, email, phone, hire_date FROM staff WHERE department = '{department}' AND status = 'Active'

name: 📊 Course Enrollment Summary
sql: SELECT c.course_code, c.course_name, c.department, c.enrolled_count, c.max_capacity, ROUND(100.0 * c.enrolled_count / c.max_capacity, 2) as capacity_usage FROM courses c ORDER BY capacity_usage DESC

name: 🎓 Student Performance Summary
description: Get average exam scores per student
sql: SELECT s.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name, s.course_code, ROUND(AVG(e.score), 2) as average_score, COUNT(e.exam_id) as exams_taken FROM students s JOIN exams e ON s.student_id = e.student_id GROUP BY s.student_id ORDER BY average_score DESC

name: 📅 Today's Attendance
sql: SELECT s.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name, a.status FROM students s LEFT JOIN attendance a ON s.student_id = a.student_id WHERE a.attendance_date = date('now')
